stories.title: Messi Named in Argentina's Preliminary World Cup Squad
stories.desc: Lionel Messi has been named in Argentina's initial roster for their title defense, set for a record sixth World Cup tournament at age 38.

stories.title: One Month Until World Cup 2026 Kickoff
stories.desc: FIFA World Cup 2026 begins June 11 with 48 teams competing across the USA, Canada, and Mexico in the largest edition ever.

stories.title: Key Stars Face World Cup Doubt Due to Injuries
stories.desc: Canada captain Alphonso Davies out for several weeks after Champions League injury, threatening his World Cup participation starting June 12.

stories.title: Panini's Largest World Cup Album Features 980 Stickers
stories.desc: The 2026 Panini sticker album, launched April 28 at Wembley Stadium, is the biggest ever with 980 stickers across 112 pages for all 48 teams.

stories.title: Coca-Cola Partners with Panini for Exclusive Stickers
stories.desc: 12 exclusive Panini stickers featuring World Cup stars like Kane and Yamal are hidden inside specially marked Coca-Cola bottles from mid-May.

stories.title: Kansas City Expects Late World Cup Booking Surge
stories.desc: Kansas City tourism leaders anticipate a surge in hotel reservations from Argentina, Ecuador, and Netherlands fans as the tournament approaches.
